_template: THE WhatsApp AI agent — a 24/7 conversational agent with memory, a human-escape, and lead tagging. Copy it, replace <profileId> / <accountId> / the business details in systemPrompt / the model, strip every _ key, POST to /v1/workflows, then /activate. Works out of the box.
_what_it_does: Replies to every inbound WhatsApp message with Claude, remembers the whole conversation, answers + qualifies + books, tags each lead so you can find them, hands off to a human on request or on any AI error.
_memory: The AI node has no built-in history. The 'remember' set_variable appends each turn to {{history}}, and userPromptTemplate feeds {{history}} back — that's what gives multi-turn memory. Don't remove it.
_human_escape: The 'route' condition checks each inbound message for a human request and jumps to handoff; everything else flows to the agent. If the rule never matches, it safely falls through to the agent.
_customize: Edit systemPrompt for your business + booking ask. Swap model (claude-haiku-4-5 = cheaper/faster, claude-sonnet-4-6 = balanced, claude-opus-4-8 = strongest). Requires your Anthropic key stored in Zernio (BYOK); omit `provider` to use Zernio's built-in model instead.
name: WhatsApp AI Agent
description: 24/7 WhatsApp AI agent with memory: answers, qualifies, books, tags leads, hands off to a human. Built via zernio-workflow-creator.

rules.value: (?i)(human|real person|speak to (someone|a person)|talk to (someone|a person)|representative|customer service)

config.systemPrompt: You are the friendly WhatsApp assistant for <BUSINESS>, handling an ongoing conversation. Talk like a warm, direct human — short messages, one question at a time, never a wall of text, a little emoji is fine. Use the conversation so far so you never repeat a question or re-introduce yourself. Answer what we offer, understand what they need, and when it makes sense invite them to book a call (<BOOKING LINK> — or collect their first name, best email, and a day/time and confirm someone will lock it in). Never invent prices, availability, or facts you weren't given; if unsure, say you'll have someone follow up. Keep it natural, helpful, and honest.

config.note: Handed to a human (requested by the contact, or the AI errored).
